predicted_caption: Mitã oguapy. Mitã oguereko akãngao. Ka'avo oĩ mitã-pe.
english_intermediate:
A child sits.
The child wears a hat.
A plant is behind the child.
back_translation: The child sits. The child wears a hat. The plant is with the child.
target_caption: Jasy Jatere, pe mita'i akã sa'yju oikóva ka'aguýre asaje pyte jave; oguerekóva ipópe ivara ju omoasẽ haguã mitãme ha ogueraha haguã chupekuéra hendive.

predicted_caption: Tembi'u oĩ mesa ymaguare-pe. Tembi'u oguereko avati. Tembi'u oguereko kesú.
english_intermediate:
The food is on a table.
The food has corn.
The food has cheese.
back_translation: The food is on the ancient table. The food has corn. The food has cheese.
target_caption: Ko’ápe ojekuaa porã pe Chipa guasu he’ẽ asýva, ojejapóva avati kyre’ỹ ha kesu paraguáigui; ijyvate ha overa asy hína, ha’éva tembi’u opave’ỹva’erã ñande meságui.

predicted_caption: Kuña oñembo'y. Mitãkuña oñembo'y.
english_intermediate:
A woman stands in the forest.
A girl stands in the forest.
back_translation: The woman stands. The girl stands.
target_caption: Kuña ha mitãkuña oiporúva ao guaraní teete. Ko’ã ao ohechauka yvypóra ypykue rekotee ha ñande rapo guaraní ymaite guive.

predicted_caption: Ñuhã oĩ yvy-pe. Ñuhã ha'e peteĩ yvyra.
english_intermediate:
A trap is on the ground.
The trap is made of wood.
back_translation: The trap is on the ground. A trap is made of wood.
target_caption: Trampa yvyrágui ojejapóva okaháre, ojeipurúva ojejapyhy hag̃ua mymba michĩva.

predicted_caption: Guyra oñembo'y. Guyra oĩ ita-pe.
english_intermediate: A bird stands on a stone.
back_translation: The bird stands. The bird is on the stone.
target_caption: Alonsito oguapýva hupa ári, ojejapóva tuju memégui ha ojogua tatakua. Ko guyra niko ojapo hupa yvyra térã yvyramáta rehe.

predicted_caption: Jukysy ha'e sa'y sa'yju. Jukysy oguereko so'o. Jukysy oguereko ñanakuéra.
english_intermediate:
The soup is yellow.
The soup has meat.
The soup has herbs.
back_translation: The soup is yellow in color. The soup has meat. The soup has herbs.
target_caption: Vori vori, tembi'u paraguái teete ojejapóva ryguasu rykuégui, avati ku'i ha kesú, ha'e hína peteĩ tembi'u ojeikuaavéva Paraguáipe.

predicted_caption: Rapo hũngykuéra oguereko hikuái mandi'o. Mandi'o oĩ mymba-pe.
english_intermediate:
The roots are brown.
The manioc is in a pile.
back_translation: The brown roots have manioc. The manioc is in the animal.
target_caption: Mandi'o pyahu, rapo oñekotevẽva Paraguáipe; oje'u oñembopupúva térã oñembochyryrýva.

predicted_caption: Kuña oñembo'y. Ogaguy ha'e peteĩ kapi'i. Yvága ha'e sa'y hovy.
english_intermediate:
A woman stands at a house.
The roof is made of straw.
The sky is blue.
back_translation: The woman stands. A roof is made of straw. The sky is the color blue.
target_caption: Óga okaháre ojejapóva yvyrágui ha hi'ári kapi'i. Ko'ã ógape ojeipuru opa mba'e oĩva upe rupi.
